what_changed: Added validated PR evidence for PR #507, which had added traceability sidecars for PR #505 and PR #506.

pr-evidence/pr507-traceability-evidence/.why: The release workflow requires every merged PR to have machine-checkable PR evidence. PR #507 was a traceability maintenance PR but still needed direct evidence, and this PR should not create another follow-up traceability gap.
